# Fused Distribution

> Fused Distribution is an operator-led hub running multiple ventures under one roof: custom small-business websites (Fused Technology Solutions), silver subscriptions (Fused Reserve), curated collectibles including Warhammer 40K miniatures, and books/coaching (Fused Education). New products and clients added continuously.

## About

Fused Distribution is built on one idea: operators who own the whole stack move faster than agencies, brokers, or middlemen. Every division under the Fused roof is run hands-on, with direct producer and vendor relationships. The roster of products and ventures grows continuously.

The flagship division is Fused Technology Solutions, a subscription service that builds custom websites for small businesses. The client sees the site fully built before paying a dollar. Hosting (Cloudflare), Google Business setup, local SEO, and ongoing management are included in one monthly subscription.

## Divisions

### Fused Technology Solutions — primary revenue
- Custom small-business websites
- Subscription pricing: Foundation $99/mo, Standard $300/mo, Expansion $500/mo
- Site is fully built before any payment
- Hosting on Cloudflare's global network included
- Google Business Profile setup & local SEO on Standard and Expansion
- No long-term contracts on monthly plans
- URL: https://fuseddistribution.com/pricing/

### Fused Reserve — silver subscriptions
- Monthly silver bullion subscription
- Low-premium bullion with curated inventory
- Direct sourcing relationships, no broker markup
- Subscribers can ship physical silver or hold in allocated storage
- Tiers for both new buyers and experienced stackers
- URL: https://fuseddistribution.com/reserve/

### Fused Education — books, coaching, training
- Book: "The Richest Dev In The Valley" (coming soon) — modern parable on wealth, Bitcoin, and the ancient rules that still apply
- 1:1 coaching sessions
- Group coaching (quarterly on Standard plan, monthly on Expansion)
- AI strategy and workflow coaching for operators
- URL: https://fuseddistribution.com/education/

### Distribution Catalog — physical products
- Physical silver (via Fused Reserve)
- Warhammer 40K miniatures and kits (curated inventory, sourced through the Fused network)
- New verticals and product lines added continuously as sourcing advantages open up

## How Fused Builds Websites

Three-step process:
1. Kickoff conversation — understand the business, goals, and audience
2. Custom build, no payment — full custom site delivered in 5–10 business days, previewed live
3. Subscribe and launch — client picks a plan, site goes live on their domain, ongoing management begins

## Businesses Fused Serves

Primarily local service businesses: restaurants, repair shops, contractors, salons, collision repair, and other small operators. Not a fit for large e-commerce/shopping-cart sites (currently).

## Key Differentiators

- Site built before payment — zero risk to the client
- Cloudflare hosting, SSL, and monitoring included
- Month-to-month plans (no lock-in)
- Direct operator relationship (not an agency model)
- Multi-division operator hub — the same team that builds your site also runs silver, collectibles, and education ventures
